title: sphaeropteris aeneifolia
intro: Sphaeropteris aeneifolia, also known as the golden sago fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyatheaceae, native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris aeneifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal decoction, infusion, or poultice, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
